description: Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte. This top from Tonga is a definite must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple with this knitted top and pair it up with flats and jeans. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product Details Geometric patterned casual top with a round neck, has elasticated ruche detailing at the shoulders, batwing raglan sleeves, elasticated hemline Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
